fade-in-duration.name: Fade In Duration
fade-in-duration.description: Duration of character fade-in animation in seconds.

fade-out-duration.name: Fade Out Duration
fade-out-duration.description: Duration of character fade-out animation in seconds.

pop-in-enabled.name: Pop In Enabled
pop-in-enabled.description: Translate characters into place on fade-in.

pop-in-angle.name: Pop In Angle
pop-in-angle.description: Direction of pop-in motion in degrees (0 = up).

pop-in-angle-random.name: Randomize Pop In Angle
pop-in-angle-random.description: Random angle 0-360 per character on fade-in.

pop-in-distance-random.name: Randomize Pop In Distance
pop-in-distance-random.description: Random distance from 0 to 50 per character on fade-in (ignores distance slider).

pop-out-enabled.name: Pop Out Enabled
pop-out-enabled.description: Translate ghost characters away on fade-out.

pop-out-angle.name: Pop Out Angle
pop-out-angle.description: Direction of pop-out motion in degrees (0 = up).

pop-out-angle-random.name: Randomize Pop Out Angle
pop-out-angle-random.description: Random angle 0-360 per character on fade-out.

pop-out-distance-random.name: Randomize Pop Out Distance
pop-out-distance-random.description: Random distance from 0 to 50 per character on fade-out (ignores distance slider).
